opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The patches on my elbows have cracked wide open. They're bleeding, extremely sore, and the skin around them is red and hot. I think they're infected.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: They cracked and bled tonight and I'm worried it's a spreading infection.

symptom_narrative.character: thick scaly plaques with deep painful bleeding cracks
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: sharp pain on bending the elbows
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: cracked when bending, dry cold weather
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: cracks bleed; a red rim around from rubbing; no fever; no pus
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: long-standing a scaly skin condition (stopped my cream weeks ago)

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a scaly skin condition on elbows/knees

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: prescribed an autoimmune skin condition ointment (not used for weeks)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: dry cold weather; stopped topical treatment

objective_data_offered.value: thick silvery-scaled red plaques on both elbows with deep bleeding cracks; a 1-2 cm red rim around that fades (blanches) when I press a glass on it; no pus; skin not obviously hot
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: phone-camera view + patient glass test; cannot palpate warmth/induration remotely
